author: codex-agent

patch.value: Feature targets large tracker maintenance workflows where many items are assigned to different owners and manual force-update loops create operational overhead.
Add governance batch-mutation mode with explicit ownership override planning

Provide a safe orchestration mode for governance operations that precomputes required ownership overrides, surfaces approval-ready plans, and executes deterministic batches with per-item audit traces.
A governance batch mode can generate an override plan (dry-run), list affected assignees/items, require explicit confirmation, and execute scoped mutations with clear per-item audit output.
Ownership conflict patterns from governance sweeps are documented and acceptance safety constraints are defined.
Reduce manual ownership-conflict remediation during approved audits
Lowers execution friction for legitimate cross-owner governance maintenance
Cuts repetitive force operations while preserving transparent safety controls
Approved governance runs can execute at scale with clear auditability
The latest standards-alignment run required over 200 ownership override updates handled manually.
Run large governance normalization over cross-owned items and observe repetitive ownership conflict handling.
Maintainers can execute approved governance maintenance faster with explicit safety evidence.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'ownership conflict force audit override workflow' --limit 20; pm search 'ownership-safe batch mutation mode governance override' --limit 20; pm list-open --limit 20. Net-new because current items improve guidance only; no feature currently provides plan+execute batch ownership override workflow for governance operations.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Design should separate planning and execution phases and require explicit operator confirmation before any forced mutation batch.

value.note: ownership conflict and override UX anchor
policy constraints for approved ownership overrides

message: Create feature for governance batch ownership override planning
